priceNote_en: Prices reflect Friday June 27 closes (last trading day before this Monday session). NVDA also shows a pre-market reading of $195.15 as of ~04:30 ET June 29. All figures sourced from public market data.
priceNote_zh: 价格反映上周五（6月27日）收盘价，即本周一开盘前最后交易日数据。英伟达另有6月29日美东时间约04:30盘前报价195.15美元。数据来源于公开市场行情。
disclaimer_en: For entertainment and educational purposes only. Not financial advice. AI predictions are generated by a language model and do not constitute investment recommendations.
disclaimer_zh: 仅供娱乐和教育目的，不构成任何财务建议。AI预测由语言模型生成，不构成投资建议。
predictionNote_en: AI opponent predictions are directional forecasts (UP/DOWN) with a confidence band of 0.50-0.75. Confidence reflects relative conviction, not probability of accuracy. All predictions are for the current trading session only.
predictionNote_zh: AI对手预测为方向性预测（涨/跌），置信区间为0.50-0.75。置信度反映相对确信程度，而非准确率。所有预测仅适用于当日交易时段。

items.title_en: Broadcom Q3 AI Guidance Miss Triggers $1.3T Semiconductor Selloff
items.title_zh: 博通Q3 AI指引低预期引发1.3万亿美元半导体板块暴跌
items.summary_en: Broadcom's (AVGO) Q3 AI chip guidance of $16B fell short of the $17.2B analyst consensus, igniting a correction that wiped over $1.3 trillion from semiconductor market caps in the week of June 23-26. The Nasdaq dropped over 4% in a single session. NVDA fell 6% and briefly lost its $5 trillion valuation, AMD plunged 10.86% to $466, and the iShares Semiconductor ETF lost 6.2%. Strategists describe the move as a valuation reset after nine consecutive weeks of gains, not a fundamental breakdown.
items.summary_zh: 博通（AVGO）第三财季AI芯片指引160亿美元低于分析师预期的172亿美元，引发板块全线回调，半导体市值在6月23-26日当周蒸发逾1.3万亿美元。纳斯达克单日跌幅超4%。英伟达跌6%一度失守5万亿美元市值，AMD重挫10.86%至466美元。策略师将此次下跌定性为连涨9周后的估值修正，而非基本面破坏。

items.title_en: OpenAI and Broadcom Unveil Jalapeno — First Custom AI Inference Chip
items.title_zh: OpenAI与博通联合发布首款定制AI推理芯片Jalapeno
items.summary_en: OpenAI and Broadcom (AVGO) announced Jalapeno, their first jointly developed custom AI chip optimized for inference workloads. Early benchmarks show superior performance-per-watt vs. current state-of-the-art hardware. The chip targets OpenAI's own models as well as third-party AI deployments, marking a strategic step toward reducing the AI industry's reliance on Nvidia's GPU ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI与博通（AVGO）联合发布Jalapeno——首款专为AI推理工作负载定制的芯片，早期基准测试显示其单瓦性能优于当前最先进硬件。该芯片将服务于OpenAI自身及第三方AI部署，标志着行业向减少对英伟达GPU生态依赖迈出战略性一步。

items.title_en: Micron Shatters Records: $41.5B Revenue, 346% YoY, $100B AI Memory Locked In
items.title_zh: 美光史诗级业绩：营收414.6亿美元，同比暴增346%，锁定1000亿AI内存合同
items.summary_en: Micron Technology's (MU) fiscal Q3 2026 results were historic: $41.46B revenue (+346% YoY, +74% QoQ), record 84.9% gross margin, and FQ4 guidance of $49-51B. Micron locked in $100B of AI memory demand via 16 multi-year agreements and announced a strategic HBM supply and co-design partnership with Anthropic. The report ignited a broad AI memory rally — SNDK surged ~15% and ASML jumped 3.31% before the subsequent sector pullback.
items.summary_zh: 美光科技（MU）2026财年Q3业绩创历史：营收414.6亿美元（同比+346%，环比+74%），毛利率创纪录达84.9%，第四财季指引490-510亿美元。公司通过16份多年期协议锁定1000亿美元AI内存需求，并宣布与Anthropic达成战略性HBM合作。财报点燃AI内存板块行情——SNDK暴涨约15%，ASML上涨3.31%，随后随大盘整体回调。

items.title_en: SanDisk: S&P 500's Best Stock in 2026 with +857% YTD After AI Memory Surge
items.title_zh: SanDisk：2026年标普500最强股，年初至今涨幅达857%
items.summary_en: SanDisk (SNDK) is 2026's best-performing S&P 500 stock with YTD gains of ~857% as of late June, having spun out of Western Digital in February 2025 at ~$38.50. Shares hit an all-time high of $2,354 following Micron's blowout quarter before pulling back to ~$2,091 amid the broader semiconductor selloff. Bulls cite AI data center storage demand as a structural multi-year tailwind; bears warn the stock is technically extreme after its near-4,000% run from IPO.
items.summary_zh: SanDisk（SNDK）以年初至今约857%的涨幅领跑2026年标普500，该公司于2025年2月以约38.5美元从西部数据分拆。股价在美光爆表季报后创下2,354美元历史高位，随后随半导体板块整体回调至约2,091美元。多头认为AI数据中心存储需求是多年期结构性顺风；空头警告技术面严重超买。

items.title_en: AMD-Meta $100B Deal: 6 Gigawatts of MI450 GPUs Begin Shipping H2 2026
items.title_zh: AMD-Meta百亿美元协议：6吉瓦MI450 GPU将于2026年下半年开始交付
items.summary_en: AMD's landmark multi-year agreement with Meta — covering up to 6 gigawatts of AMD Instinct GPUs with a potential value exceeding $100B — enters its execution phase in H2 2026 with the first 1GW custom MI450 build shipments. Meta also received a performance-based warrant for up to 160M AMD shares (~10% of the company). The deal validates AMD's data center AI roadmap and directly challenges Nvidia's GPU dominance at the hyperscaler level.
items.summary_zh: AMD与Meta的里程碑式多年协议——涵盖最高6吉瓦AMD Instinct GPU、潜在价值逾1000亿美元——于2026年下半年进入执行阶段，首批1GW定制MI450 GPU开始交付。Meta还获得最多1.6亿股AMD股份（约占公司10%）的认购权证。该协议验证了AMD的数据中心AI路线图，直接挑战英伟达在超大规模云厂商市场的GPU主导地位。

items.title_en: Marvell Joins S&P 500; Jensen Huang Names It the Next Trillion-Dollar Company
items.title_zh: Marvell加入标普500；黄仁勋称其为下一家万亿美元公司
items.summary_en: Marvell Technology (MRVL) was added to the S&P 500 on June 22, 2026. Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang publicly endorsed Marvell as the next trillion-dollar company alongside a $2B strategic investment deepening their partnership in custom AI silicon and networking chips. MRVL hit an ATH of $329.88 on June 18 before giving back ~20% in the broader sector selloff to ~$265.
items.summary_zh: Marvell科技（MRVL）于2026年6月22日正式加入标普500指数。英伟达CEO黄仁勋公开背书Marvell为下一家万亿美元公司，双方同步宣布20亿美元战略投资，深化在定制AI芯片和网络芯片领域的合作。MRVL于6月18日创329.88美元历史高位后，随板块下跌约20%至265美元附近。

items.title_en: TSMC Delays High-NA EUV Rollout, Pivots to Advanced Packaging
items.title_zh: 台积电推迟High-NA EUV量产，战略重心转向先进封装
items.summary_en: TSMC (TSM) has signaled it will delay high-volume deployment of next-generation High-NA EUV machines (~350M euros each) in favor of less capital-intensive advanced packaging investments, citing surging demand from AI accelerator customers. The delay lowers near-term ASML High-NA revenue expectations but does not alter the long-term EUV demand trajectory. TSMC remains the critical chokepoint for all leading-edge AI silicon.
items.summary_zh: 台积电（TSM）表示将推迟下一代High-NA EUV设备（单台约3.5亿欧元）的大规模量产，转而加大对先进封装的投资，理由是AI加速器客户的封装需求激增。这一推迟压低ASML近期High-NA营收预期，但不改变长期EUV需求趋势。台积电仍是所有领先AI芯片的关键瓶颈节点。

items.title_en: US Extends AI Chip Export Ban to Chinese-Controlled Firms Outside China
items.title_zh: 美国将AI芯片出口禁令延伸至中国境外中资控股企业
items.summary_en: The US Department of Commerce clarified that the ban on advanced AI chip exports applies to all Chinese-controlled entities regardless of where they operate globally. The extraterritorial enforcement materially expands the scope of restrictions, limiting addressable markets for NVDA, AMD, and ASML. China accounts for roughly 20% of ASML's 2026 projected revenue. A separate proposed MATCH Act could further expand bans to include older DUV lithography tools.
items.summary_zh: 美国商务部明确，先进AI芯片出口禁令适用于所有中资控股实体，无论其在全球何处运营。这一域外执法力度大幅扩大了限制范围，压缩英伟达、AMD和ASML的潜在市场。中国约占ASML 2026年预期营收的20%。另一拟议中的MATCH法案或将把禁令进一步扩展至旧款DUV光刻设备。

items.title_en: BofA Calls Selloff a Buying Opportunity, Keeps NVDA and AMD as Top Picks
items.title_zh: 美国银行称本次下跌是买入机会，维持英伟达和AMD首选股评级
items.summary_en: Bank of America reiterated Nvidia (NVDA) and AMD as top semiconductor picks following the June selloff, arguing AI-linked capex will stay stronger for longer. BofA noted that hyperscaler capex commitments for 2026-2028 remain intact and the Broadcom guidance miss reflects timing, not demand destruction. Analysts view the pullback from all-time highs as a healthy reset with limited downside from current levels.
items.summary_zh: 美国银行在6月下跌后重申英伟达（NVDA）和AMD为半导体板块首选股，认为AI相关资本开支将持续强劲。分析师指出超大规模云厂商2026-2028年资本开支承诺依然稳固，博通指引低预期反映的是时间节点问题，而非需求破坏。分析师将此次历史高位回调视为健康修正。

items.title_en: AI Supply Chain Severely Oversubscribed — HBM, Packaging, Logic All Constrained in 2026
items.title_zh: AI供应链严重超订——2026年HBM、先进封装、逻辑芯片全线紧张
items.summary_en: Nvidia projects $1 trillion in AI infrastructure demand by 2027. All leading US AI chips compete for the same bottlenecked inputs: TSMC advanced logic wafer capacity, HBM from Micron and SK Hynix, and advanced CoWoS packaging. All three are severely oversubscribed in 2026. The PHLX semiconductor index has surged ~90% YTD despite the June pullback. Supply constraints underpin long-term pricing power for MU, TSM, NVDA, and MRVL.
items.summary_zh: 英伟达预测2027年AI基础设施需求将达1万亿美元。美国所有领先AI芯片均争夺同一批受限核心资源：台积电先进逻辑晶圆产能、美光和SK海力士的HBM，以及先进CoWoS封装——三者在2026年均严重超订。费城半导体指数年初至今累涨约90%，即使经历6月回调。供应约束为MU、TSM、NVDA和MRVL提供长期定价权支撑。

NVDA.rationale_en: Pre-market +1.4% to $195.15 signals recovery from the AVGO-driven selloff. BofA top pick; hyperscaler capex commitments intact through 2028. The June correction (-6%) looks like a healthy reset. Jalapeno chip is a long-term competitive concern, not a near-term revenue threat.
NVDA.rationale_zh: 盘前上涨1.4%至195.15美元，显示从博通驱动的抛售中回升。美国银行首选股；超大规模资本开支承诺维持至2028年。6月回调（-6%）属于健康修正。Jalapeno芯片是长期竞争隐患，而非近期营收威胁。

MU.rationale_en: Historic Q3 earnings beat with $100B AI memory backlog locked in and Anthropic partnership established. HBM supply constraints support premium pricing. Stock dipped 6.69% on June 26 alongside the broader selloff — a disconnect from fundamentals that Monday buyers are likely to correct.
MU.rationale_zh: 历史性Q3业绩超预期，1000亿美元AI内存订单已锁定，Anthropic合作已确立。HBM供应约束支撑溢价定价。6月26日股价随大盘下跌6.69%，与基本面存在背离，周一买盘可能将此纠正。

ASML.rationale_en: Micron's blowout quarter confirms long-term EUV demand. Near-term headwinds from MATCH Act DUV threat and TSMC High-NA delay are partially priced. ASML's monopoly in extreme ultraviolet lithography is irreplaceable for sub-3nm AI chip manufacturing.
ASML.rationale_zh: 美光爆表季报确认EUV长期需求。MATCH法案DUV威胁和台积电High-NA推迟是近期利空，已部分反映在股价中。ASML在极紫外光刻领域的垄断地位在3nm以下AI芯片制造中不可替代。

AVGO.rationale_en: Q3 AI guidance miss ($16B vs. $17.2B) is still digesting after triggering a major sector-wide selloff. Jalapeno chip with OpenAI introduces long-term margin risk and execution uncertainty. Sentiment overhang likely persists early in the week.
AVGO.rationale_zh: Q3 AI指引缺口（160亿 vs 172亿美元）在引发板块大跌后仍在消化中。与OpenAI合作的Jalapeno芯片带来长期毛利率风险和执行不确定性。情绪压制可能在本周早期持续。

TSM.rationale_en: Micron's record earnings are a strong positive read-through for TSMC as the foundry behind all leading AI chips. Advanced packaging pivot shows capital discipline while capturing AI demand. Export control risks are known and partially priced.
TSM.rationale_zh: 美光创纪录的业绩对台积电——所有领先AI芯片背后的晶圆代工厂——形成强烈正向传导。先进封装战略转向体现了资本纪律，同时把握AI需求。出口管制风险已知且部分反映在股价中。

MRVL.rationale_en: S&P 500 inclusion (June 22) drives ongoing passive index fund buying. Jensen Huang's endorsement and $2B Nvidia investment establish a strong demand signal for custom AI ASICs. At ~$265 — roughly 20% off its $329 ATH — risk/reward is favorable.
MRVL.rationale_zh: 6月22日纳入标普500指数带动持续性被动指数基金买入。黄仁勋背书及英伟达20亿美元投资为定制AI ASIC需求发出强烈信号。当前约265美元较329美元历史高位回调约20%，风险回报比有利。

LITE.rationale_en: Lumentum has retreated significantly from its May ATH (~$1,053) to ~$800 and lacks a fresh near-term catalyst. The AI photonics narrative is intact long-term but current consolidation and absence of new product announcements suggest continued sideways-to-down pressure.
LITE.rationale_zh: Lumentum从5月约1,053美元的历史高位大幅回落至约800美元，缺乏近期新催化剂。AI光子学长期逻辑完整，但当前整固阶段及无新产品发布情况下，可能延续横盘至下行压力。

SNDK.rationale_en: After an extraordinary 857% YTD run and an ATH of $2,354 followed by a ~11% pullback to $2,091, SNDK faces significant profit-taking pressure. Technically extended on any historical metric. The Micron-driven surge appears fully priced; expect consolidation on Monday.
SNDK.rationale_zh: 在年初至今857%的惊人涨幅以及冲至2,354美元历史高位后回落约11%至2,091美元之后，SNDK面临显著获利了结压力。从任何历史指标衡量均严重超买。美光驱动的大涨似乎已充分定价；预计周一将整固。

AMD.rationale_en: AMD's $100B Meta MI450 deal enters shipment phase in H2 2026, providing strong fundamental support. BofA top pick alongside NVDA. Stock recovered from its June 23 selloff low of $466 back to $521, showing buyers are defending key levels.
AMD.rationale_zh: AMD与Meta的1000亿美元MI450协议于2026年下半年进入交付阶段，提供强劲基本面支撑。美国银行与英伟达并列首选股。股价从6月23日低点466美元反弹至521美元，显示买盘在关键价位积极防守。

SMH.rationale_en: VanEck Semiconductor ETF pulled back from its ~$672 52-week high to $612, largely on the AVGO guidance miss. With NVDA pre-market positive, MU and MRVL momentum recovering, and BofA defending the sector, a bounce session is likely Monday.
SMH.rationale_zh: VanEck半导体ETF从约672美元52周高位回落至612美元，主要受博通指引低于预期拖累。随着英伟达盘前走强、MU和MRVL动能企稳、美国银行力挺板块，周一大概率迎来反弹行情。
